title: And the food and beverage manager came to.
content:
And the food and beverage manager came to.

I didn't know he was food and beverage.

I want to see what he stayed.

So, when he came down, so he must have known him.

Then the general manager came down to talk to us, and she's,I's at the party.

I was like, I'm gonna explain this to you, okay?

When I fill into this hotel, I look around and I go, oh, we have a handicap.

So I just wanted to talk to the car myself.

I don't need, you know, I could talk in a handicap stuff, but your hotel doesn't even have the handicaps, but I'm not even sure if that's legal, first of all, that you don't offer handicaps spot.

All right?

But so beyond that, I said, I, and then, and then I didn't want to call so I asked if I could I could park my own car.

They told me, no, it's only valet.

I go, and then it was raining out, and I didn't want to park my car where the guy wanted me to park my car, but my husband's a rule follower, and he did what the man told him to do.
context: From document: 4320 Mariners Cove Dr 2.m4a — chunk 190 (chunk 190/225)
